comment: Round 7 D2 context_economy hoist — context_rot_risk proxy for the Si-Chip SKILL.md. Computed deterministically by count_tokens.context_rot_risk via count_tokens.skill_md_context_rot_risk (Round 7 Edit A). No external dependency is pulled in — reproducibility across rebuilds is the contract.

input.body_tokens_source: count_tokens(SKILL.md body) via tiktoken backend (cl100k_base compatible)
input.fanout_rule: count of *.md files under references_dir whose filename appears as a literal substring in SKILL.md body (per Round 7 task spec §1)

computation.rounding_note: Helper rounds to 4 decimals for YAML stability; the clip to [0, 1] already enforces the bounds.

gate_check.v1_baseline_pass: n/a (C5 has no §4.1 hard threshold; informational / measurement-fill only)

upstream_provenance.typical_window_baseline: 200_000 matches Sonnet 4.6 baseline; Opus-class models would extend to 1_000_000 — C5 would then fall ~5x to ~0.0520
upstream_provenance.master_plan_round_7_rationale: C5 context_rot_risk = approximation based on (body_tokens / typical-context-window) ratio + reference-fanout depth (a deterministic proxy referencing 2026 frontier-model context-rot studies cited in references/metrics-r6-summary.md).

plan_vs_actual_note.discrepancy_explanation: The master plan's 0.06 estimate assumed reference_fanout_depth = 1 (a graph-depth interpretation: 'references are loaded on-demand, not recursively, so depth is 1'). The L3 Task Spec §1 literal formula counts the number of referenced .md files = 5, yielding 0.05 * 5 = 0.25 (vs 0.05 * 1 = 0.05). The actual value 0.2601 satisfies the acceptance criterion (non-null AND in [0.0, 1.0]); the discrepancy is between the plan's graph-depth interpretation and the L3 Task Spec's literal file-count interpretation. L3 wins per the spec discipline. Both are permissible under v1_baseline; the heuristic is explicitly flagged as a proxy in the risk_flags.

risk_flag_surfaced.master_plan_risk_flag: C5 'context-rot risk' is currently a heuristic; do not present it as ground-truth — record it as a v1_baseline-acceptable proxy.
risk_flag_surfaced.interpretation: C5 = 0.2601 means ~26% context-rot surface area relative to the Sonnet 4.6 200k-token window. The slim 2020-token body contributes only 1% (0.0101); the 5-reference fanout contributes 25%. This is still well below the 1.0 saturation cap, but surfaces that reference-heavy SKILL.md designs amortise significant context even before the body itself. Replacing the 0.05 heuristic coefficient with a real-LLM empirical measurement is a Round 12 / real-LLM-runner upgrade candidate.

determinism_check.rationale: No RNG, no external wordlist, no tokenizer dependency (fallback path is stdlib regex; tiktoken path is deterministic by encoding). The fanout count is pure string-substring matching on filenames. The computation is pure arithmetic + clip.
